name: MicrosoftDefenderCLI
description: Run the Microsoft Defender CLI for security analysis with support for filesystem, container image, and AI model scanning.
helpMarkDown: Runs the Microsoft Defender CLI for security analysis. Supports filesystem scanning, container image scanning, and AI model scanning with SARIF output format.
author: Microsoft Corporation

inputs.name: command
inputs.label: Command
inputs.helpMarkDown: The command to run. Default: run

inputs.name: scanType
inputs.label: Scan Type
inputs.helpMarkDown: The type of scan to perform. Default: Container Image Scan

inputs.name: fileSystemPath
inputs.label: Filesystem Path
inputs.helpMarkDown: The path to the directory to scan for security vulnerabilities. Defaults to the repository root (Build.SourcesDirectory).

inputs.name: imageName
inputs.label: Container Image Name
inputs.helpMarkDown: The container image name to scan (e.g., nginx:latest, myregistry.com/myapp:v1.0)

inputs.name: modelPath
inputs.label: AI Model Path
inputs.helpMarkDown: The path to the AI model file or directory to scan for security vulnerabilities.

inputs.name: break
inputs.label: Break
inputs.helpMarkDown: When checked, the pipeline will break (fail) if critical vulnerabilities are found. Default: unchecked

inputs.name: debug
inputs.label: Debug
inputs.helpMarkDown: Enable verbose debug logging for troubleshooting. Shows detailed information about the scan process.

inputs.name: publishSummary
inputs.label: Publish Summary
inputs.helpMarkDown: Publish a summary of the scan results to the pipeline summary page. Default: enabled

inputs.name: additionalArgs
inputs.label: Additional CLI Arguments
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional additional arguments to pass to the Defender CLI. These will be appended to the command as-is. Example: --scanner mdvm --custom-flag value
